title: Improve "from" behavior with unnamed references
body: Fix our instantiation behavior when the source image reference is not a named reference.  Take the opportunity to rename the `--registry` CLI flag to `--transport`.

comments.body: Fixed an inconsistency (was `--default-transport` in `build-using-dockerfile`, instead of `--transport`, as it should have been), and added a note stressing that we don't insert any additional separator when combining the transport name with the image name.
What errors are you getting back when you try to commit or push to a `docker-daemon:` destination?
Yes, this should fix those pull errors.

Ok I will approve this patch and open another one to remove --transport.  Just so we can fix the issue.
@rh-atomic-bot r+ fb32f53
